norwegian: Hvis du ___ tidlig, rekker du toget.
english: If you leave early, you will catch the train.

norwegian: Hvis jeg ___ deg, ville jeg studere mer.
english: If I were you, I would study more.

norwegian: Om det ___ fint vær i morgen, går vi en tur.
english: If the weather is nice tomorrow, we will go for a walk.

norwegian: Hvis jeg ___ mer tid, ville jeg lære å spille gitar.
english: If I had more time, I would learn to play guitar.

norwegian: Hvis du er sulten, er det mat i kjøleskapet.
english: If you are hungry, there is food in the fridge.

norwegian: Om jeg hadde penger, ville jeg reise til Japan.
english: If I had money, I would travel to Japan.

norwegian: Hvis det regner i morgen, tar vi bilen i stedet.
english: If it rains tomorrow, we will take the car instead.

norwegian: Hvis hun hadde visst det, hadde hun aldri sagt ja.
english: If she had known that, she would never have said yes.

norwegian: Om du trener regelmessig, vil du føle deg bedre.
english: If you exercise regularly, you will feel better.

norwegian: Hvis jeg har tid, går jeg på kino.
english: If I have time, I go to the cinema.

norwegian: Hvis jeg er syk, går jeg til legen.
english: If I am sick, I go to the doctor.

norwegian: Hvis jeg har en hund, tar jeg den på tur.
english: If I have a dog, I take it for a walk.

norwegian: Hvis jeg bor i byen, går jeg på museet.
english: If I live in the city, I go to the museum.

norwegian: Om du løper raskt, vinner du.
english: If you run fast, you win.

norwegian: Hvis det regner, tar jeg paraplyen.
english: If it rains, I take the umbrella.

norwegian: Hvis du spiser mye, blir du syk.
english: If you eat a lot, you get sick.

norwegian: Hvis det er kaldt, tar jeg en genser.
english: If it is cold, I take a sweater.

norwegian: Hvis jeg ser en film, nyter jeg den.
english: If I watch a film, I enjoy it.

norwegian: Hvis jeg hadde penger, ville jeg kjøpe en bil.
english: If I had money, I would buy a car.

norwegian: Om det regner, tar jeg paraplyen.
english: If it rains, I take the umbrella.

norwegian: Hvis jeg er sulten, spiser jeg en sandwich.
english: If I am hungry, I eat a sandwich.

norwegian: Hvis jeg ser en venn, hilser jeg på ham.
english: If I see a friend, I greet him.

norwegian: Hvis jeg har en sykkel, sykler jeg til jobb.
english: If I have a bike, I ride to work.

norwegian: Om jeg har en frist, leverer jeg oppgaven.
english: If I have a deadline, I submit the assignment.

norwegian: Hvis jeg har en jobb, jobber jeg hardt.
english: If I have a job, I work hard.

norwegian: Hvis jeg var deg, ville jeg gå hjem.
english: If I were you, I would go home.

norwegian: Hvis du har lekser, gjør du dem.
english: If you have homework, do it.

norwegian: Hvis jeg hadde tid, ville jeg hjelpe deg.
english: If I had time, I would help you.

norwegian: Hvis jeg var i byen, ville jeg handle.
english: If I were in the city, I would shop.

norwegian: Hvis du er trøtt, legger du deg.
english: If you are tired, you sleep.

norwegian: Hvis du er ferdig tidlig, kan vi gå en tur.
english: If you are done early, we can go for a walk.

norwegian: Dersom det er sol i morgen, sykler vi til stranden.
english: If it is sunny tomorrow, we will cycle to the beach.

norwegian: Hvis du glemmer passet ditt, slipper du ikke inn på flyplassen.
english: If you forget your passport, you will not get through at the airport.

norwegian: Dersom du ikke har spist, kan vi stoppe på en kafé.
english: If you have not eaten, we can stop at a cafe.

norwegian: Hvis bussen er forsinket, tar vi toget.
english: If the bus is late, we will take the train.

norwegian: Hvis du vil lære norsk raskt, bør du øve hver dag.
english: If you want to learn Norwegian quickly, you should practise every day.

norwegian: Dersom du trenger hjelp, kan du ringe meg.
english: If you need help, you can call me.

norwegian: ___ det snør i morgen, blir skolen stengt.
english: If it snows tomorrow, school will be closed.

norwegian: Dersom du er på bussen, kan du vinke til meg.
english: If you are on the bus, you can wave to me.

norwegian: Hvis du ___ billetter på forhånd, slipper du å stå i kø.
english: If you buy tickets in advance, you avoid queuing.
